definition: Male organ producing sperm and testosterone.
A bad to the bone class mathematician and the unfortunate parent of an Usagi plushie.
Windpipe carrying air to bronchi; lined with cilia and mucus.
The synthesis of mRNA from a DNA template in the nucleus.
The process which ribosomes read mRNA to assemble amino acids into proteins.
Loss of water vapor from plant leaves, creating a transpiration pull.
An organism's position in a food chain (e.g., producer, consumer).
